title: T-044 — Scheduler Run Detail page
prompt:
# T-044 — Scheduler Run Detail page

PRD: `07-PLANNING-EXT-PRD.md` §17.1 PLE-002, §9.2, §9.3.
UX/prototype refs are listed in `pipeline_inputs.scope_files`.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Create a full audit detail view for a single scheduler run.

## Implementation contract
One server-side loader fetches run, assignments, override audit, and summary. UI follows the two-column prototype, with typed status variants and secure snapshot rendering.

ACP shape reminder: keep this task as one atomic implementation. Do not add ACP-owned fields. Keep local dependencies in `dependencies`; cross-module contracts in `cross_module_dependencies` are blockers/inputs, not ACP local task IDs.

pipeline_inputs.description: Implement /scheduler/runs/[runId] detail with metadata, output summary, input snapshot viewer, override log, assignments table.
pipeline_inputs.details: Matches pext_run_detail. Reads scheduler_runs joined to assignments/override audit rows. Shows cached/fallback/partial status badges and per-line utilization.
acceptance_criteria: Given a completed run, then metadata/output summary/assignments/override log render with pext_run_detail prototype parity.
Given input_snapshot link is opened, then JSON is shown in a collapsible or modal without exposing another tenant.
Given a fallback/partial run, then warning badges and error/partial messaging are visible.
test_strategy: RED loader tests for tenant scoping and joined data; RTL parity snapshot.
risk_red_lines: Do not expose raw input_snapshot cross-tenant or with PII beyond authorized roles.
Do not compute utilization client-side from incomplete data.
Do not omit override reason audit rows.
